name: Bluewalnut
description: Bluewalnut (Galaxia Moneytree) payment gateway APIs focused on global/crossborder KR commerce.

seo.title: Bluewalnut — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Bluewalnut: Bluewalnut (Galaxia Moneytree) payment gateway APIs focused on global/crossborder KR commerce.

when_to_use: Processing cross-border e-commerce payments for Korean merchants globally
Korean card and bank transfer payments via Galaxia Moneytree gateway
International checkout with Korean payment method support for global platforms
Cross-border settlement for Korean fashion and lifestyle e-commerce

review.verdict: Relevant mainly for merchants selling into Korea — solid local expertise but not a global API contender.
review.best_for: International merchants selling into Korea needing KRW acceptance
review.not_for: Global businesses wanting a single modern developer-first platform
